case_title: SF MUNI RAILWAY EMPLOYEES FCU VS THOMAS WOODROW S et al

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS WOODROW S THOMAS JANET E
NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION/OPPOSITION TO CLAIM OF EXEMPTION SET FOR FEB.22-94 AT 9:00AM IN DEPT.6.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-04-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-04-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SF MUNI RAILWAY EMPLOYEES FCU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMAS WOODROW S THOMAS JANET E $2,189.97 PRINCIPAL, $108.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,298.47, DEFT HAS AGREED TO PAY $350 MON COMMENCING 3/30/92 (AUTOMATICE PAYROLL DEDUCTION) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTOIN IS GRANTED. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EAR NINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR.
